title: Ship RevOps acquisition surfaces and expansion forecasting content
summary: Records release evidence for the new RevOps landing page, the RevOps generic dashboard comparison page, and the expansion-forecasting blog that ties customer usage, release history, and weekly reviews into one revenue-operations workflow.
completed_todo_items: Ship 2 practical blog posts every sprint
Keep release-history generation tied to release evidence for meaningful public launches

smoke_or_visibility.notes: Confirms the RevOps landing page, RevOps comparison page, homepage discovery links, and expansion-forecasting blog route all render from the production build and stay visible in the public route smoke suite.
Confirms the RevOps acquisition batch is represented in release evidence so announcement and changelog generation stay current.

ops.rollback_plan: Revert the RevOps landing page, RevOps comparison entry, expansion-forecasting blog content, and release-evidence manifest in tokvera-dashboard and tokvera if the positioning or SEO direction needs to change.
